hypothesis: If we train an XGBoost ∆-learning model to predict the difference between GFN1-xTB and DFT (PBE/HSE06) band gaps of MOFs using ST-135, RAC, and APRDF descriptors, then its cross-validated MAE on DFT band gaps will be lower than that of direct-prediction models (including MOFTransformer and CGCNN) because the xTB baseline captures most electronic structure trends and the model only learns systematic residuals.
